target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible destruction of upper floors and roof sections; significant structural collapse and debris; intact lower brick walls suggest framed building with non-load-bearing upper damage; damage exceeds 45% of visible target area.

summary: One building assessed with SEVERE DAMAGE (CONFIRMED), showing upper floor and roof destruction with debris and intact lower walls. The scene depicts a long, multi-unit brick building with extensive structural damage across its upper levels, surrounded by rubble and debris in a paved lot. The damage suggests the building is functionally non-operational, likely uninhabitable or unusable for its original purpose.
